title: dianthus × helveticorum
intro: Dianthus × helveticorum, also known as the Swiss catchfly, is a perennial plant species within the carnation family. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to act as an expectorant and a demulcent, making it useful for soothing irritated mucous membranes and relieving coughs. The health benefits of Dianthus × helveticorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support skin health due to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various conditions, including bronchitis, sore throats, and skin irritations.
